title: UltimateHopper
description: This is a hopper plugin like DonutSMP
body:
**UltimateHopper – High-Speed Hopper Optimization Plugin**

UltimateHopper is a performance-focused Minecraft plugin inspired by DonutSMP, designed to significantly improve hopper transfer speed while maintaining full vanilla compatibility.

Built for efficiency and scalability, this plugin enhances item flow systems without compromising server stability—making it perfect for farms, storage systems, and high-traffic servers.

**⚠️ Dependency:**
- KervsCore 

**✨ Features:**

Accelerated Hopper Transfer – Dramatically increases hopper item movement speed for faster automation.

Vanilla-Compatible System – Works seamlessly with default Minecraft mechanics without breaking gameplay balance.

Lag Reduction Optimizations – Improves server performance by handling hopper operations more efficiently.

Reliable & Stable – Designed to handle large-scale farms and storage systems without issues.

Simple Configuration – Easy-to-manage setup with reload support for quick adjustments.

**🛡️ Commands:**

/uh reload – Reload the plugin configuration instantly.

/uh info – View the current status and performance of UltimateHopper.

**💡 Why use UltimateHopper?**

Hoppers are one of the biggest causes of lag in many servers. 

UltimateHopper solves this by optimizing how items are transferred, allowing your server to run smoother while keeping farms fast and efficient—just like high-performance SMP servers.

**📌 Perfect for:**

Survival Servers (SMP)
Economy Servers
Farm-Heavy Servers

High-Traffic Servers
Automation-Based Gameplay
Upgrade your server’s efficiency and eliminate hopper lag with UltimateHopper!

**❖ DEVELOPED BY KERVSDEV ❖**
